architecture_observations.title: The request_hire tool schema requires budgetMonthlyCents
architecture_observations.summary: The request_hire tool schema requires budgetMonthlyCents.
architecture_observations.detail: Initialize context management for the current workspace and current task state. | Start a context-manager session for the current workspace while tracking the Executive Director instructions update that adds explicit Phase 1 hire budgets required by request_hire. | Recent actions: Read adapter/src/tools.ts to confirm request_hire requires budgetMonthlyCents. | Edited instructions/executive-director.md to add six explicit Phase 1 budget lines. | Validated the updated Executive Director file contains six budget entries.
